parameters.formDescription: Paste your workflow JSON below and fill in the details. The AI will generate a README and publish everything to GitHub automatically.

parameters.subject: ⚠️ Workflow Submission Failed — Please Review Your JSON
parameters.message:
⚠ Workflow Error

Workflow run failed

Your n8n workflow was unable to complete successfully. The submitted input could not be processed.

LIKELY CAUSE

Invalid or malformed workflow JSON was submitted through the form.

Please review the following before trying again:

✅  The JSON was exported directly from n8n and is unmodified
✅  The pasted content is valid JSON (no trailing commas or missing brackets)
✅  The form field was not left empty or partially filled

This is an automated message from your n8n workflow. If the problem persists after retrying with valid JSON, please check your workflow configuration or contact your administrator.
